content: Google Places API billing: Text Search costs $32/1000 requests (Tier 1: 0-100k/mo), $25.60/1000 (Tier 2: 100k-500k). Place Details: $17/1000 (Tier 1). Field masking required by new API - billed at highest tier requested (Essentials/Pro/Enterprise). $200 monthly credit replaced by per-SKU free tiers in 2025. Nearby Search $32/1000. Surcharges up to $0.005/request for contact/atmosphere data. Hard daily and per-minute rate limits enforced per API method per project.
